title: Pinned tab bar component with context menu and tab management
purpose: Displays pinned tabs in a horizontal bar with context menu functionality for managing tab visibility and navigation.
module_context: Exports a React functional component named PinnedTabBar that manages pinned tabs using Zustand stores and renders them with Tab components and a context menu.

steps.content: Retrieve the list of tabs and active tab ID from the session tabs store.
Get functions to set active tab, close tabs, unpin tabs, and promote tabs to permanent status from the tabs store.
Initialize state for tracking context menu position and target tab.
Filter and sort pinned tabs by their order.
If no pinned tabs exist, return null to render nothing.
Render each pinned tab with appropriate click and context menu handlers.
If a context menu is active, render the TabContextMenu component with appropriate actions.
Set the active tab ID in the tabs store.
Get the current session store state.
IF the tab is an embed kind, select the corresponding artifact in the session store.
ELSE IF the tab is a code-file kind, select the corresponding pseudo path in the session store.
ELSE IF the tab is an artifact kind with a type, route to the appropriate selection method based on artifact type.
IF a tab is not the target tab, close it.
Find the index of the target tab in the pinned tabs list.
IF the tab is not found, return without taking action.
Slice the pinned tabs list starting from the next tab.
Close each tab in the sliced list.
